# Gina Gonzalez Notary

> Gina Gonzalez is a certified mobile notary public and wedding officiant serving Sacramento, California and surrounding areas. NNA certified, bilingual in English and Spanish, with over 10 years of experience and 6,000+ documents notarized. She holds a legal background from law school in Peru.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2016
- Location: Sacramento, California (mobile — travels to clients)
- Industry: Notary Public, Legal Services, Wedding Officiant
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Certifications: NNA (National Notary Association) Certified, Insured
- Experience: 10+ years, 6,000+ documents notarized
- Background: Former attorney (law school in Peru)
- Phone: (415) 948-9967
- Hours: 7:00 AM to 9:00 PM, seven days a week
- Service Areas: Sacramento, West Sacramento, Elk Grove, Roseville, Folsom, Rancho Cordova, Citrus Heights, Davis, Woodland, Lincoln, Auburn, Carmichael, Fair Oaks, Orangevale, Natomas

## Frequently Asked Questions
- How much does a notary cost in Sacramento? California sets the maximum notary fee at $15 per signature. Mobile notary services may include a travel fee.
- Does a notary need to be present for signing? Yes, California law requires the signer to appear in person before the notary. Remote online notarization is not yet legal in California.
- What documents does a mobile notary notarize? Common documents include power of attorney, real estate deeds, loan documents, affidavits, court documents, prenuptial agreements, and DMV forms.
- Do you offer Spanish notary services? Yes, Gina is bilingual in English and Spanish and offers certified translation services for documents.
- What areas do you serve? Sacramento, West Sacramento, Elk Grove, Roseville, Folsom, Rancho Cordova, Citrus Heights, Davis, Woodland, Lincoln, Auburn, Carmichael, Fair Oaks, Orangevale, and Natomas.
